location.description: The location of the ReportConfig. The source and destination buckets specified in the ReportConfig must be in the same location.

frequency_options.description: Options for configuring how inventory reports are generated. Structure is [documented below](#nested_frequency_options).

frequency.description: The frequency in which inventory reports are generated. Values are DAILY or WEEKLY. Possible values are: `DAILY`, `WEEKLY`.

start_date.description: The date to start generating inventory reports. For example, {"day": 15, "month": 8, "year": 2022}. Structure is [documented below](#nested_frequency_options_start_date).

end_date.description: The date to stop generating inventory reports. For example, {"day": 15, "month": 9, "year": 2022}. Structure is [documented below](#nested_frequency_options_end_date).

parquet_options.description: An option for outputting inventory reports as parquet files.

csv_options.description: Options for configuring the format of the inventory report CSV file. Structure is [documented below](#nested_csv_options).

record_separator.description: The character used to separate the records in the inventory report CSV file.

delimiter.description: The delimiter used to separate the fields in the inventory report CSV file.

header_required.description: The boolean that indicates whether or not headers are included in the inventory report CSV file.

object_metadata_report_options.description: Options for including metadata in an inventory report. Structure is [documented below](#nested_object_metadata_report_options).

metadata_fields.description: The metadata fields included in an inventory report.

storage_filters.description: A nested object resource. Structure is [documented below](#nested_object_metadata_report_options_storage_filters).

storage_destination_options.description: Options for where the inventory reports are stored. Structure is [documented below](#nested_object_metadata_report_options_storage_destination_options).

display_name.description: The editable display name of the inventory report configuration. Has a limit of 256 characters. Can be empty.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.

day.description: The day of the month to start generating inventory reports.

month.description: The month to start generating inventory reports.

year.description: The year to start generating inventory reports

day.description: The day of the month to stop generating inventory reports.

month.description: The month to stop generating inventory reports.

year.description: The year to stop generating inventory reports

bucket.description: The filter to use when specifying which bucket to generate inventory reports for.
The destination bucket that stores the generated inventory reports.

destination_path.description: The path within the destination bucket to store generated inventory reports.
